summary: Frontend testing of 6 features completed successfully. All features working as expected: AI Template Assistant has 'Automated/Robotic' tone option and resets on close, Client Profile Notes have timestamps with admin edit/delete controls, Funded Deal Profile has Edit Deal dialog and editable payment amounts.
seed_data_creation: Added test note to client profile during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 requested features are working correctly. AI Template Assistant on /templates has 'Automated / Robotic' tone option and resets properly when dialog is closed. Client Profile Notes show timestamps and author names, with admin-only edit/delete buttons. Funded Deal Profile has Edit Deal button that opens a dialog with editable fields (Funded Amount, Total Payback, Payment Amount, Payment Frequency, Deal Type, Notes). Payment schedule table has editable amount inputs that update successfully.

ai_template_automated_tone.description: AI Template Assistant dialog on /templates has 'Automated / Robotic' tone option in the Tone dropdown
ai_template_automated_tone.evidence: Tone dropdown shows options: Professional, Friendly, Urgent, Casual, Automated / Robotic

ai_template_dialog_reset.description: AI Template Assistant dialog resets to default values when closed and reopened
ai_template_dialog_reset.evidence: After changing to 'Payment Reminder' and 'Urgent', closing and reopening shows 'Follow Up' and 'Professional' defaults

client_notes_timestamps.description: Client Profile Notes show timestamped entries with author information
client_notes_timestamps.evidence: Note entry shows timestamp (e.g., '3/11/2026, 4:55:33 AM') and author name ('Admin User')

client_notes_admin_controls.description: Admin users can edit and delete notes on Client Profile
client_notes_admin_controls.evidence: Edit (pencil icon) and Delete (X icon) buttons visible on note entries for admin user

funded_deal_edit_button.description: Edit Deal button on Funded Deal Profile opens edit dialog
funded_deal_edit_button.evidence: Edit Deal button in header opens 'Edit Funded Deal' dialog with fields: Funded Amount, Total Payback, Payment Amount, Payment Frequency, Deal Type, Notes

funded_deal_editable_payments.description: Payment amounts in schedule table are editable
funded_deal_editable_payments.evidence: Amount column contains input fields, editing triggers 'Payment updated' toast notification

technical_notes.ai_dialog_reset: handleAiDialogClose function in Templates.js resets aiTemplateType, aiTone, aiInput, and aiChatMessages when dialog closes
technical_notes.note_logs_structure: Notes stored as note_logs array with id, text, created_at, created_by, created_by_name fields
technical_notes.payment_edit: handlePaymentUpdate function in FundedDealProfile.js updates individual payment amounts via fundedApi.updatePayment
